description_long: This is a modern, geometric wooden shelving unit composed of two interlocking rectangular frames, one slightly taller and offset from the other. The structure is made from a rich, medium-brown wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a warm and natural appearance. The larger frame features an open shelf, while the smaller frame is partially inset, creating a dynamic, asymmetrical design. On one side, there are two square drawers with minimalist cut-out handles, providing concealed storage within the open framework. The overall construction is sturdy, with clean lines and a smooth finish, making it suitable for both decorative display and practical storage. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, interlocking wooden shelving unit with open frames and two square drawers, featuring a warm wood grain and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the open rectangular frames and the offset, interlocking design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the wooden panels and the depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the two square drawers and the geometric arrangement of the frames.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stepped profile and the solid wood construction.
